TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Madaljalu ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 99 buwan, 278 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 273 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 5 hi nya. rhzyal kki'an lingay na Madaljalu ga Maledep ru Valjulu. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Madaljalu ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo qalang Madaljalu ga maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Madaljalu ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ma*aljalu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kiŋβoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. rħzjal kkiʔan liŋaj na ma*aljalu ɣa male*ep ru *aljulu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ma*aljalu ɣa uŋat kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo qalaŋ ma*aljalu ɣa maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ma*aljalu ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Madaljalu ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 99 buwan, 278 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 273 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 5 hi nya. rhzyal kki'an lingay na Madaljalu ga Maledep ru Valjulu. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Madaljalu ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo qalang Madaljalu ga maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Madaljalu ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ma*aljalu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kiŋβoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. rħzjal kkiʔan liŋaj na ma*aljalu ɣa male*ep ru *aljulu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ma*aljalu ɣa uŋat kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo qalaŋ ma*aljalu ɣa maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ma*aljalu ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
